processDocuments.errorCargaInicial: System processes could not be loaded. The server might be starting.
processDocuments.archivosEncontradosConfirmar: {n} files found in {raiz}. Do you confirm you want to vectorize them?
processDocuments.sinDocsRevertir: No documents in VECTORIZED or NOT_VECTORIZED status with the applied filters.
processDocuments.convTitulo: The system explains what it does
processDocuments.convSubtitulo: Like a patient assistant. Zero jargon. The metric is secondary to the message.
processDocuments.convAntesMensaje: I found {n} documents in {carpeta}. If you'd like, I'll prepare them so you can ask them questions.
processDocuments.convAntesTiempo: It'll take about {min} the first time.
processDocuments.convEnProcesoMensaje: Going well. I've done {hechos} of {total} documents. About {min} left.
processDocuments.convEnProcesoMensajeSinEta: Going well. I've done {hechos} of {total} documents.
processDocuments.convSubmensaje: document {n}{errores, plural, =0 {} other { · # with error so far}}
processDocuments.convPorQue: Drops the weight of "progress bars" and replaces it with a readable message. Works well for business users because it sounds human. "Stop" as a text link reduces the fear of clicking by mistake.
processDocuments.narrativoPorQue: The four stages tell a story: "your documents are coming in here and coming out there". The live ticker is what calms users most in long processes: you see something is happening.

processPipeline.sincronizarDesc: Select the root directory of your documents. The system will read the folder structure and automatically synchronize it with the group's location tree.
processPipeline.pedirAcceso: Directory access will be requested. Select the root folder:
processPipeline.irADocumentos: After synchronizing folders, go to the
processPipeline.procesarAutomatico: Documents will be processed automatically. You can close this tab and return later.
processPipeline.sinDocumentosPendientes: There are no documents pending processing. If you have just indexed files, press
processPipeline.sinPermisoLectura: No read permission for the directory.
processPipeline.ayudaCargarDesdeDirectorio: Use "Index Locations from Directory" to index from a folder on your computer.
processPipeline.seleccionarCarpetaRaizTitulo: Select root folder on your computer
processPipeline.eliminarUbicacionMensaje: {ubicaciones} location(s) and {documentos} document(s) will be deleted. Do you confirm?
processPipeline.avisoEliminacion: {n} location(s) that no longer exist in the directory will be deleted.
processPipeline.errorPdfProtegido: Password-protected PDF (unprotect the file before processing)
processPipeline.alertNavegadorNoSoporta: Your browser does not support this functionality. Use Chrome or Edge.
processPipeline.alertNavegadorNoSoportaCorto: Your browser does not support this functionality.
processPipeline.narrativoTitulo: Show where the documents are going
processPipeline.narrativoSubtitulo: The stages become visible. You understand what 'vectorize' does without knowing what it means.
processPipeline.narrativoPorQue: The four stages tell a story: "your documents are coming in here and coming out there". The live ticker is what calms users most in long processes: you see something is happening.

prompts.vistasGenerarSqlDesc: executes the LLM on each prompt_view and saves the SQL.
prompts.vistasSincronizarDesc: applies the SQL in DB (DROP VIEW IF EXISTS CASCADE + CREATE VIEW + GRANT chat_readonly).
prompts.mensajesUiDesc2: from the frontend. Generates EN, PT, FR, DE from Spanish. Once generated, download each file and replace it in
prompts.reemplazaArchivos2: and commit+push for Vercel to deploy with the new texts.
prompts.jerarquiasDesc: Refreshes the closure table (denormalized graph) for each hierarchy by recomputing it from the source table. In normal operation, refresh happens automatically when editing a node; this panel is for massive rebuild if it became out of sync.
prompts.apisDesc3: . LLMs only access via this table.
prompts.grafoDesc3: crossed with FKs. Does not overwrite arcs with manual code (preserves
prompts.grafoDesc4: ). Also triggers the regeneration of virtual RAG documents in the background. Super-admin only.
prompts.grafoFooter1: To synchronize a SINGLE function, use the button
prompts.erroresDuranteGeneracion: {total, plural, one {# error during generation} other {# errors during generation}}
prompts.apisRegeneradasOk: APIs regenerated: {upserted} endpoints from {total} rows of v_funcion_api.

translations.subtitulo: Language management and automatic generation of catalog translations
translations.errorSinTraducciones: Generation finished but no translations were saved. Check server logs.
translations.seccionGeneracionDescripcion: Translations are automatically generated with AI (Gemini Flash) for all active languages. Generation runs in the background — you can navigate freely while it progresses.
translations.idiomasSoportadosDesc: Only active languages are shown in the system selector
translations.notaTexto1: For a new language to function completely in the system, in addition to registering it here, it is necessary to create the message file
translations.notaTexto2: and add it to the array
translations.notaTexto4: , and then deploy. Predefined languages (ES, EN, PT, FR, DE) already have their message files included.
translations.modalRegenerarTodoMensaje: Translations for all active languages ({idiomas}) will be regenerated. Generation runs in the background, and you can continue browsing. Continue?
translations.modalEliminarIdiomaMensaje: All translations generated for {nombre} ({codigo}) will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
translations.notaIdiomaNuevo: The language will be created. To use it in the system, you must first add its message file to the project and deploy.
translations.seccionGlosarioDescripcion: The glossary is generated from Server_LM.md (product document) and injected as context into all system translations. It is the source of terminological truth.
translations.glosarioInexistente: No glossary yet. Click "Regenerate Glossary" to generate it from Server_LM.md.
translations.descripcionGeneracionConHabilidad: Translations use the TRANSLATE_TEXTS ability (configurable model in /abilities). The ability's system prompt references Server_LM.md and Glossary.md.

tipoElemento.USUARIO_desc: User — available for any end-user role
